Show Circuit

Shows We
Service

Regular transportation to the Northeast's premier horse shows. We know the routes, the schedules, and what it takes to get there.

Featured
July - August

Vermont Summer Festival

Manchester, VT

Premier hunter/jumper series with championship finals and top competitors from across the country.

June - July

Lake Placid Horse Show

Lake Placid, NY

Historic Adirondack show grounds featuring USEF-rated hunter and jumper divisions.

May - September

HITS Saugerties

Saugerties, NY

World-class show circuit with prestigious championship events and substantial prize money.

Why Choose Us

Safe, ReliableTransportation

We operate a modern horse trailer designed for comfort and safety. Whether it is one horse or a full load, we get them to the show ready to compete.

Fully Insured

Comprehensive coverage for peace of mind on every journey

On-Time Guarantee

We know show schedules and plan routes accordingly

25+ Years Experience

Decades of trusted horse transport expertise

Northeast Specialists

Regular routes to every major show in the region

25+
Years of Service
Coverage Area

Where We Travel

Based in Norwich, Vermont, we regularly transport horses to shows throughout the Northeast and beyond.

next show?
